## Entities.AnyJournalEntryEntity type

Discriminated union of all journal entry types. Use type guards to narrow to specific types.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type AnyJournalEntryEntity = IFillingEditJournalEntryEntity | IConfectionEditJournalEntryEntity | IFillingProductionJournalEntryEntity | IConfectionProductionJournalEntryEntity;
```
